title: Remove 'A Unit of Bhagyalaxmi Construction' branding; mention only 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' in vendor selection steps

requirements.text: Remove all occurrences of 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (and its Hindi/Odia equivalents) from every user-facing surface across the application — including the page title in index.html, the Footer's unit designation line, the Header, Hero section, and any other component or translation key that currently displays this sub-branding phrase. The standalone name 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (or 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction') must still appear wherever the business name is shown.

quotes: Remove A unit of Bhagyalaxmi Construction.

acceptanceCriteria: The string 'A unit of' / 'A UNIT OF' no longer appears anywhere in the rendered UI in any language (en/hi/od).
The page title in index.html no longer contains 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'.
The Footer component does not render a unit designation line containing 'a unit of'.
All translation keys (en/hi/od) in translations.ts that contained 'a unit of bhagyalaxmi construction' are updated to remove that sub-phrase.
The business name 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction' continues to appear where it should.

requirements.text: In the SchemeInfo component's vendor/installer selection step (Phase 2 of the application process), update the text in all three languages (English, Hindi, Odia) so that it explicitly instructs the user to select 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' as the vendor/empanelled installer. No other vendor names should be mentioned in this step.

quotes: only in vendor selection mention to select BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION

acceptanceCriteria: Phase 2 vendor selection step in SchemeInfo displays 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (or localised equivalent) as the vendor to select.
No other vendor names appear in the Phase 2 vendor selection step in any language.
The instruction is present and correctly rendered in English, Hindi, and Odia.

constraints: Do not alter any file under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui (immutable paths).
Backend logic and data schema must not be changed.
nonGoals: Adding or removing any features beyond the branding text changes described above.
